summary: Across the year, the engineer focused on building a SaaS crypto trading platform, developing HID firmware and Windows drivers, and conducting ML research for trading and poker. Additional work included Android LLM assistants, file-tagging utilities, and various automation tools.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Built a kernel-mode input filter and injection driver with push-style event delivery and integration tests.

items.title: NZT mobile app updates
items.description: Added product flavor and extended system information for the mobile assistant app.

items.title: Crypto trading platform development
items.description: Iterated on the SaaS crypto trading platform, building out infrastructure, execution engine, billing, and strategy templates.

items.title: HID firmware improvements
items.description: Addressed connectivity issues and drafted a new firmware variant for the ESP32-S3 emulation device.

items.title: File-tagging utility polish
items.description: Polished release workflows and changelog generation for the Windows Explorer file-tagging tool.

items.title: Aim assist and overlay project
items.description: Enhanced aim assist features with YOLO confidence thresholds, debug overlay, and USB-HID fallback.

items.title: Firmware version releases
items.description: Released new firmware versions with dual-core and USB support for the HID device.

items.title: Crypto prediction model research
items.description: Conducted experiments with Mixture of Experts architectures and benchmarked crypto price prediction models.

items.title: Android LLM assistant
items.description: Built an LLM-powered assistant with phone-use capabilities, focusing on sub-agent delegation and model management.

items.title: E-reader custom firmware
items.description: Developed a custom firmware for an e-reader, adding map, knowledge base, and encoding support.

items.title: CI/CD and store publishing
items.description: Iterated on CI/CD pipelines, Microsoft Store publishing, and CLI features for the file-tagging utility.

items.title: Code intelligence engine
items.description: Expanded a graph-powered code analysis tool with LSP integration and multi-language support.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Built a fast, on-host YOLO annotation tool with multi-select and batch editing.

items.title: Neovim configuration
items.description: Set up a full IDE environment in Neovim with LSP, treesitter, and remote clipboard support.

items.title: Firmware stability fixes
items.description: Improved serial restart reliability and overall stability of the HID firmware.

items.title: Poker computer vision pipeline
items.description: Developed a CV pipeline for online poker hand analysis, achieving high accuracy in card and action detection.

items.title: Aim assist enhancements
items.description: Added linger mode, autofire, and HID click emulation to the aim assist project.

items.title: Task management app
items.description: Built a task management app with touch event visualization and direct launch features.

items.title: Firmware feature expansion
items.description: Added support for new devices, performance modes, and BLE safety features to the HID firmware.

items.title: Autonomous coding tool
items.description: Enhanced an autonomous multi-session AI coding tool with squash merging and worktree management.

items.title: Aim assist modes
items.description: Implemented different aim assist modes and USB HID mouse movement hacks.

items.title: n8n Claude integration
items.description: Updated an n8n node for Claude Code to use the Claude Agent SDK and added Haiku model support.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy development
items.description: Developed and optimized multiple Freqtrade trading strategies with various indicators and parameters.

items.title: Freqtrade Telegram bot
items.description: Built a multi-bot Telegram interface for managing Freqtrade instances with profit tracking.

items.title: Freqtrade monitoring app
items.description: Created a Flutter mobile app for monitoring Freqtrade bots with charts and win-rate visualization.

items.title: Telegram assistant bots
items.description: Worked on Telegram bot assistants for content forwarding, summarization, and image deduplication.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy optimization
items.description: Optimized Freqtrade trading strategies through hyperparameter tuning and backtesting.

items.title: Crypto signal Telegram bot
items.description: Built a Telegram bot that generates crypto trading signals using AI and technical analysis.

items.title: ChatGPT Telegram bot
items.description: Maintained a .NET-based Telegram bot for ChatGPT interactions.
